hooks.command: jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just made a git commit. You MUST now update docs/PROJECT_LOG.md: add a new row to the version table with the next version number, today date (2026-05-08), a one-line summary of what changed, and the commit SHA from the git commit output. Do this before responding to the user."}}'
